Hire CRM Experts

Certified CRM specialists for setup, migration, automation, and reporting on the platforms your team already uses.

Overview

What you get when you hire from us.

CRM consultants who design pipelines around how your team actually sells, migrate cleanly from spreadsheets or legacy tools, and build the dashboards your leadership will check every Monday.

Key skills

Capabilities you can plan around.

Pipeline & lifecycle design
Workflow automation
Lead scoring & routing
Data migration
Reporting & dashboards
Sales & marketing alignment

Tech stack

Tools and stacks we ship in.

Platforms

  • HubSpot

Automation

Integrations

Reporting

Hiring models

Flexible engagement, your choice.

Full-time dedicated

A senior specialist fully embedded in your team, 160 hrs/month, billed monthly.

Part-time / fractional

80 hrs/month engagement for projects that don't need a full FTE yet.

Project-based

Fixed scope, fixed timeline, fixed quote — ideal for a defined deliverable.

Why hire from Ecliptix Solutions

Senior talent. Direct access. No middlemen.

Senior-only bench — every specialist has 4+ years of production experience
Direct access — no project managers translating your asks
Time-zone overlap with India, EU, US East, and Middle East
Replace anyone in 7 days, no questions asked
Weekly demos, transparent timesheets, monthly retros
NDA-protected, IP fully assigned to you

Project types

What we've shipped before.

CRM SetupData MigrationSales AutomationReporting & DashboardsMarketing Automation

Process

From brief to shipping, in days.

01

Share your requirement

Tell us the role, stack, tenure, and the outcomes you need.

02

Get matched in 48 hrs

We shortlist 2-3 senior profiles from our bench with relevant work.

03

Interview & trial

Technical interview, paid trial task, and a working session with your team.

04

Onboard & ship

Your hire joins your standups, repos, and tools — and starts shipping in week one.

FAQ

Things people ask before hiring.

Yes — clean dedup, normalized contacts, and a documented data model handed back to you.

Yes. Live sessions, Loom walkthroughs, and a written SOP.

Depends on team size and budget — we'll recommend honestly, not by partner commission.
